title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.33 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: CFTC — EUR

title: AUD/USD

text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break — JPY no longer acting as a safe haven; watch for regime shift implications.
